description: Order IDs that appear more than once in the orders table.
Orders with no linked customer. Cannot attribute revenue.
Returns that reference an order_id that does not exist in orders.
Orders that have no corresponding items in order_items.
Shipments where ship_date is after actual_delivery date.
Order items that reference an order_id that does not exist.
Email addresses linked to more than one customer record.
Products with zero/null price or cost exceeding selling price.
Orders missing a total amount — cannot be used in revenue reporting.
Returns marked approved but with no refund amount recorded.
